title: Canadian Ricotta Poutine
description: A dessert twist on the classic Canadian dish, featuring ricotta cheese, fondant, and a touch of Canadian flair.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together the fondant and ricotta cheese until smooth.
3. Pour the maple syrup into the mixture and stir until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
7. Slice into squares and serve warm.
